function.name: get_code
function.description: Look up the active access code for a unit. Always start with just the unit_label. If the response is error=needs_phone, ask the caller for their phone number and call again with both unit_label and phone_e164. Open-policy units return the code without auth; restricted-policy units require the caller's phone to be on the rentor's allowlist. Never invent a code.

unit_label.description: The unit's printed label, e.g. 'P204' or 'P015'. Convert spoken word-numbers to digits before passing.

phone_e164.description: Caller's phone number in E.164 format, e.g. +15555550111. Only required when the first call returns error=needs_phone.

messages.content: One moment while I look that up.

function.name: rotate_code
function.description: Change (rotate) the active access code for a unit. ONLY the rentor (the phone number registered against the unit) can do this. The backend verifies the caller_phone matches the unit's rentor; if not, returns error=not_rentor. Always read the new code back and get caller confirmation before calling this tool.

unit_label.description: The unit's printed label, e.g. 'P204'. Convert spoken word-numbers to digits.

new_code.description: The new code to set. 4-8 digits, digits only (no letters, no spaces).

caller_phone.description: Caller's phone in E.164, e.g. +15555550111. Must match the unit's registered rentor phone.

valid_hours.description: How many hours the new code stays active. Default 24 if caller doesn't specify. Examples: '1 day' = 24, '3 days' = 72, '1 week' = 168.

messages.content: Got it, updating the code now.
